purpose: Register, discover, gate, and dispatch all tool executions — from built-in file/shell tools through MCP servers and skill-based extensions, producing structured ToolResult objects

activities.name: Register Built-in Tools
activities.description: Load grep, glob, view, edit, bash, shell, rm, mkdir, mv, cp, ls, pwd, cat, tail, head, find, understand_codebase, ask_user tools with their JSON schemas and handler functions

activities.name: Discover MCP Servers
activities.description: Load MCP server definitions from .mcp.json, .vscode/mcp.json, ~/.copilot/mcp-config.json; support stdio and HTTP transports; establish connections and enumerate available tools

activities.name: Load Skills
activities.description: Discover skill definitions from ~/.copilot/skills/ and builtin-skills/ directory; feature-flagged via copilot_cli_skills_instructions; register skill tools into unified tool registry

activities.name: Gate Tool Execution Through Permissions
activities.description: Apply permission types: shell, write, mcp, read, url, custom-tool, memory, hook, extension-management, extension-permission-access, commands; prompt user or auto-allow based on policy

activities.name: Dispatch Tool Call to Handler
activities.description: Route to built-in handler, MCP server, or external SDK handler based on tool origin; pass arguments, handle timeouts and cancellation

activities.name: Collect and Format Tool Results
activities.description: Gather textResultForLlm + optional binaryResultsForLlm; classify resultType (success/failure/rejected/denied/timeout); format for model consumption

arrows.label: Tool call request (name + arguments from model)
